achievements.description: Complete the final exam stages in Adventure Mode

achievements.title: Ultra Extreme Fever
achievements.description: Earn a 100% Medal on any stage in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Practical Tactical Brilliance
achievements.description: Earn a 100% Medal on 10 stages in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Every Day I'm Pegglin'
achievements.description: Earn a 100% Medal on 25 stages in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Explodius Fame
achievements.description: Earn a 100% Medal on all 55 stages in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: A Challenge a Day...
achievements.description: Complete 10 Challenges
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: The Academy's Brightest Prospect
achievements.description: Complete 25 Challenges
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Challenge Beast
achievements.description: Complete 50 Challenges
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Peggle God
achievements.description: Complete all 75 Challenges
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Ultra Cool
achievements.description: Get a "Cool Clear" Style Shot in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Ermahgerd!
achievements.description: Complete any stage with a score of 500,000 or more in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: You Did What Now?
achievements.description: Complete any stage with a score of 750,000 or more in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: The Peggle Master Is Here!
achievements.description: Complete any stage besides 11-5 with a score of at least 650,000 without using Warren or Master Hu in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Stylin!
achievements.description: Complete any stage with a Style Score of 200,000 or more in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Ace of Adventure
achievements.description: Complete Adventure Mode with a score of at least 20,000,000
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Free Ball Skills
achievements.description: Get 5 "Free Ball Skills" Style Bonuses in a single Stage in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Free Ballin'
achievements.description: Complete any stage earning 10 or more Free Balls in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Spooktacular
achievements.description: Get a "Spooktacular" Style Bonus playing as Renfield in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Great Balls of Fire
achievements.description: Get a "Great Balls of Fire" Style Bonus playing as Lord Cinderbottom in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Zen Maniac
achievements.description: Get a "Zen Maniac" Style Bonus playing as Master Hu in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Flip Out
achievements.description: Get a "Flip Out" Style Bonus playing as Claude in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Pyramid Pileup
achievements.description: Get a "Pyramid Pileup" Style Bonus playing as Kat Tut in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Double Guide
achievements.description: Get a "Double Guide" Style Bonus playing as Bjorn Unicorn in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Big Bang
achievements.description: Get a "Big Bang" Style Bonus playing as Splork in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Triple Play
achievements.description: Get a "Triple Play" Style Bonus playing as Jimmy Lightning in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Petal to the Metal
achievements.description: Get a "Petal to the Metal" Style Bonus playing as Tula in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Spin Again
achievements.description: Get a "Spin Again" Style Bonus playing as Warren in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Free Ball Frenzy
achievements.description: Have more than one Ball go into the Free Ball Bucket in a single shot while playing as Jimmy Lightning in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Crazy Mad Skillz
achievements.description: After hitting a Peg, have a Ball fall into the Free Ball Bucket 10 times in a row using any Master besides Jimmy Lightning in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Hat Trick
achievements.description: Get a "Hat Trick" Style Bonus playing as Warren in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Pyramid Precision
achievements.description: Get an "Eye of the Pyramid" or "Pyramid Pickup" Style Bonus, playing as Kat Tut in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Ball Bonanza
achievements.description: Earn 3 Free Balls in a single shot without using Warren or Master Hu in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Preservation
achievements.description: Earn a 100% Medal on any stage with 6 or more Balls remaining without using Warren or Master Hu in Quick Play or Adventure Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: A Duel!
achievements.description: Defeat an Easy opponent in Master Duel Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Not Even a Contest
achievements.description: Defeat a Normal opponent in Master Duel Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: To Arms!
achievements.description: Defeat a Hard opponent in Master Duel Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: A Worthy Opponent
achievements.description: Defeat a Master opponent in Master Duel Mode
achievements.author: TeddyWestside
